title: FINAL FANTASY VI
edition_pinned: FINAL FANTASY VI Steam app 1173820 (2022 Pixel Remaster), observed 2026-07-13; row describes the original 1994 Super Famicom/SNES FINAL FANTASY VI design.
moat: Esper teaching and character-specific commands let a large ensemble share progression without erasing identity.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: A shared ATB grammar and esper system recombine a broad cast while bespoke commands preserve distinct tactical roles.
exemplar_rationale: Balances authored ensemble drama with flexible party construction and persistent ability learning.

evidence.claim: Steam appdetails genres field for FINAL FANTASY VI Pixel Remaster listed: RPG.
